text:
Once upon a sunlit day in a quaint town called Meadowbrook, a group of friends decided to gather at the local post office, known for its towering oak entrance and cheerful sunshine inside.

There was Lucy, the book-loving librarian who loved telling tales; Tommy, the musician with dreams bigger than his guitar; Maxine, the science whiz with a knack for unraveling mysteries; and Jerry, the practical joker. Today they planned a mini scavenger hunt for their own amusement. Each clue was a riddle about something common in Meadowbrook.

Their quest began with a slip of paper tucked into an old oak branch near the park. The first clue led them to a white house with a blue door. "Seek the whisper of the wind," it read. They approached the house and listened intently. A gentle sigh was all they got. That was their first clue's hint. Moving on.
